title: helenium graveolens
intro: Helenium graveolens, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helenium graveolens include treating respiratory problems, such as colds and allergies, as well as relieving menstrual cramps and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Helenium graveolens include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe and calm the body, making it a popular remedy in natural medicine.
